subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, the Single, the One, the Incomparable, Who hath taken unto Himself neither peer nor like. He hath sent forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الفرد الواحد الاحد الذی مااتخذ لنفسه  ویزا  و لا نظیرا قد ارسل
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for nearness to God, @humility; meekness; lowliness
